title: Skill Trust Ledger Line
description: One line per skill invocation, per SKILL_GRADUATION_POLICY.md. Evidence base for /maintain-os graduation (v0 marker removal after 3 real uses) and demotion checks. Never a vibe — mechanical read of this ledger only.

real_use.description: true = completed queue item with a full receipt; false = dry run or test call. Only real_use:true counts toward the 3-use graduation threshold.
